channel.title: taylortomlinsoncomedy
channel.description: Quarter-Life Crisis, Look At You, and Have It All streaming now on Netflix ✨

item.title: This was an incredibly hard decision to make but my health is ju...
item.description:
This was an incredibly hard decision to make but my health is just not in a great spot right now and I need to listen to my doctor. I also don’t think it’s fair to keep rescheduling on you guys, so I don’t want to do that. I’m really upset about this, but trying very hard to stay positive. Thank you all for understanding, I appreciate you more than you know. See you soon. ❤️ *Refunds will be provided at point of purchase
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
